title: angelica longipedicellata
intro: Angelica longipedicellata, also known as Dong quai, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Angelica genus. This plant is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Angelica longipedicellata include relieving menstrual cramps, improving digestion, and reducing stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Angelica longipedicellata include dried root extracts, capsules, and teas, which can be used to support women's health and promote overall well-being.
